title: Calico Cat HUD
description: A Purr-fectly Calico HUD Pack ♡ Inspired by the charming patchwork patterns of calico cats
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cq8fICO4/images/59076e26823925123d9e9b3520fed32ebb6bc5c7.png)
### ♡‧₊˚ ┊ A Tribute to my Friend┊˚₊‧♡ **_This pack created in memory of my beloved in-game pet, my sweet tricolor angel Victor_** *** ### HUD Changes ✦ Health — A sweet calico cat face
✦ Health Effects — Colored kitty paws, tinted like a vanilla effect (wither, poison, etc.)
✦ Armor — A charming basket of peonies
✦ Hunger — A stack of fluffy pancakes with berries and cream
✦ Mount Health — Lustrous, pearlescent crystals
✦ XP Bar — A shimmering rainbow
✦ Hotbar — Parchment-style slots with a paw print
✦ Slot Selection — A calico-framed border with a tiny cat face

### Meow Bonuses Every menu button has been redesigned to match the hotbar's parchment aesthetic, each one with the signature cat paw print for fully immersive and adorable experience

You can recolor icons to match your fluffy pet ♡
*** ### **Support & Contact:** You can send me a tip on [Boosty](https://boosty.to/reterica)!
For any questions or suggestions, reach me out via my [Discord](https://discord.gg/QsezmMbPQF)
***
